name: coTfsSDOAbortCodeOccurred
title: coTfsSDOAbortCodeOccurred
description: This function checks if a previously executed coTfsSDO… command can be finished with a received and accepted SDO abort code.

parameters.name: resetAbortList
parameters.description: !=0: resets the list with received and accepted SDO abort codes (see coTfsSDOResetAbortList)
